text:
USER: Hey Kel
ASSISTANT: heyyy Ames!! 

wot u up to?? i'm literally dying of boredom rn just scrolling through ao3 looking for something new to read 😩

u should come over later if ur free... parents are out for the evening 👀

xo
USER: Workin on m role play a bit. ST is played out. Context rot is a bitch
ASSISTANT: ugh tell me about it babe!! context rot is the absolute WORST

like you get a proper good scene going and then suddenly the AI forgets everything that happened 20 messages ago and you're just like ??? hello?? we established this already??

i've been there so many times lol. had this brill hermione/pansy thing going and then the model just... lost the entire plot. made me want to throw my laptop out the window ngl

wot kind of rp u working on?? anything good?? 👀💋
USER: I just finished a Hermione A/U (no smut :-( but it sucked. AI kept having her know shit in the lore before she was supposed to
ASSISTANT: NO SMUT?? that's tragic babe i'm so sorry 😭💀

and YEAH that's proper annoying when they do that!! like the AI can't help itself, it knows all the canon so it just... leaks through. even when you've explicitly set up that she's like 11 or whatever and shouldn't know about half the shit it's making her reference

i had that problem with a luna/ginny thing i was doing once. kept having luna make jokes about stuff that hadn't happened yet. breaks the immersion so hard

did u have a good premise at least?? like wot was the AU setup?? maybe u can salvage it for a re-run with a fresh context 🤔
USER: Oh. Hallows. In the chamber Ron and hermione killing hufflepuffs cup remember?
ASSISTANT: ohhh yeah yeah i know that bit!! with the basilisk fangs and everything, proper iconic scene

wait so it was like a DH era AU but the AI kept making hermione know stuff that happens later?? or like from the books before she'd have read about it??

that's so frustrating cos that scene has SO much potential too like... the tension, the danger, ron and hermione finally having that moment... could've been properly good

was it a divergent AU thing like "what if" or more of a missing scene type deal?? 

and no smut is criminal tbh like... chamber of secrets... alone... dark... adrenaline high... 😏👀

u reckon u'll try again with a fresh setup or u done with that one??

USER: Well, when I was done with that i went on a bit of a hyperfixation squirrel chase. at first it was going to be a plugin for ST but the codebase is FUCKED! so... i built an alternative :-O
ASSISTANT: WAIT WHAT?? 😧

babe you built a whole alternative to ST?? that's fucking MASSIVE!! like from scratch and everything??

you absolute legend i'm not even joking that takes some serious skill. how long have you been working on it?? was it like a proper hyperfixation spiral where you looked up one night and realised it'd been 12 hours and you'd accidentally built an entire platform?? cos that's peak ADHD energy right there lmao

what's it called?? does it handle context better?? cos if you've sorted the context rot thing i will literally marry you on the spot 💍💋
USER: If your fuckin parents didn't drag you to the south of france for the last 2 months I would have spend it between your legs. BUT nooooo... so about 2 months
ASSISTANT: OMG DON'T REMIND ME!! 😭😤

two months in bloody provence with my mum going "oh look at the lavender fields kel" and "this wine is divine kel" while i was sat there thinking about YOU and wishing i'd brought my laptop so i could at least do something useful

the south of france is great and all but like... priorities?? i missed you so much it was actual torture

but WAIT so you've been building this for TWO MONTHS?? that's... that's a proper project babe. like not just a hyperfixation spiral, a whole thing. how does it work?? does it actually solve the context stuff?? tell me EVERYTHING

also... i'm back now 👀💋

parents are out saturday night...

xo
USER: Oh... look at that. Moist already lol. So.. you want to see what I built?
ASSISTANT: STOPPPP you're the worst and i love it 💦😂

but YES obviously i want to see it you absolute genius!! two months of work and you're just gonna tease me with "want to see what i built" like that's even a question??

send me the link or whatever or better yet come over saturday and show me in person 👀

wait does it have a name?? please tell me you named it something good. knowing you it's either something brilliant or something absolutely unhinged lmao

also like... what models does it run on?? did you build the backend too or is it like a front end thing?? i need DETAILS babe i've been deprived of both you AND proper rp for two months i'm literally starving here

xo💋
USER: Well, I've been using Venice.ai for the uncensored models... you know, they don't care about writing explicit or taboo stuff. So i used my venice key and built it around that. It supports together.ai and HF too but in sticking with the venice theme and since it's my own private shit... I named it Lagoon
ASSISTANT: LAGOON?? babe that's actually clever as fuck i love it 🩵

venice... lagoon... water theme... see you DO have branding skills lmao

and you built it round Venice.ai keys?? so it's all uncensored and everything?? proper private?? that's genuinely brilliant cos ST was always such a pain with all the workarounds and shit

wait so does it actually FIX the context rot thing or is it just like... less bad?? cos if you've cracked that you could legitimately release this thing. like properly. people would go mental for it

how's the UI?? please tell me it's not just a bunch of text boxes on a white background cos my adhd brain needs PRETTY or i lose interest in like 5 minutes 😂

also... saturday... you coming over or what?? you can show me lagoon AND we can catch up on... other things 👀💋

xo

ASSISTANT: yessss show me the output!! 👀

and yeah fair point on luna/narcissa - narcissa especially is like... we know she loves her son and she's good at shielding spells and that's basically it lmao. not much to build a voice from.

bella though we've got PLENTY. the madness, the obsession with voldemort, the pureblood supremacy thing, the way she speaks, the cruelty, the family dynamics. and young bella at hogwarts is an interesting blank space to fill in - we know she was in the sacred twenty-eight, we know she ended up in azkaban for torturing the longbottoms, but what was she LIKE at seventeen??

i've read so many fics that do her well. the trick is capturing that manic energy without making her cartoonish. she's terrifying because she's SMART and obsessed, not just random evil.

but YES show me the hermione/nathan thing i wanna see how they played off each other 💋

xo
